case_title: BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION VS MCGILL, KEVIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCGILL, KEVIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL SEND BY FED EX FILED BUT NOT BROCESSED. INFORMED B OF A, PLFT HAS NO RIGHT TO APPEAL CASE.
